body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35379", "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-684", "name": "Incorrect Provision of Specified Functionality"}], "description": "A logic error in the tr utility of uutils coreutils causes the program to incorrectly define the [:graph:] and [:print:] character classes. The implementation mistakenly includes the ASCII space character (0x20) in the [:graph:] class and excludes it from the [:print:] class, effectively reversing the standard behavior established by POSIX and GNU coreutils. This vulnerability leads to unintended data modification or loss when the utility is used in automated scripts or data-cleaning pipelines that rely on standard character class semantics. For example, a command executed to delete all graphical characters while intending to preserve whitespace will incorrectly delete all ASCII spaces, potentially resulting in data corruption or logic failures in downstream processing.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00149, "percentile": 0.04511}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fhr3-xh3q-69w6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T18:04:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhr3-xh3q-69w6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fhr3-xh3q-69w6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35379"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:42Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:46Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35379", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/11405", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.8.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/358063f3367cb23a1e5db314cfdbfeb607749b3d", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhr3-xh3q-69w6"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has an Incorrect Provision of Specified Functionality Issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-30T18:04:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhr3-xh3q-69w6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
